note: Macro source of truth for the build. DECLARATIONS ONLY. Progress is DERIVED by the /roadmap skill from each track's statusFile (_STATUS.json) — never hand-write step status here. Humans edit: tracks[], dependsOn, owns, lifecycle, spine, unblockTrigger. The /roadmap skill regenerates ROADMAP.md. This file ships with ONE example track so the build system is runnable out of the box — replace it with your own tracks.

tracks.goal: Example track shipped with this starter so /build, /status, /roadmap, and /verify work immediately. Replace it with a real track (see docs/runbooks/add-a-track.md, or just edit the files under .claude/feature-tracks/example-track/).
tracks.notes: The single spine track. /build advances whichever track has spine:true. Set spine:true on whatever track is your current top priority; only one track should be the spine at a time.
